All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Ambulance
Ambulance.java represents the police ambulance unit.
CapacityExceededException
Thrown when an operation would exceed a configured capacity/limit.
CityMap
CityMap.java represents the grid of the city, within boundaries and the respective obstacles when found.
CityRescue
 
CityRescueImpl
CityRescueImpl.java is the main implementation of the CityRescue interface.
FireEngine
FireEngine.java represents the fire engine unit.
IDNotRecognisedException
 
Incident
Incident.java represents an event which requires attention and response from rescue units.
IncidentStatus
 
IncidentType
 
InvalidCapacityException
 
InvalidGridException
 
InvalidLocationException
 
InvalidNameException
 
InvalidSeverityException
 
InvalidUnitException
 
PoliceCar
PoliceCar.java represents the police car unit.
Station
Station.java symbolises a rescue station within the city.
Unit
Unit.java handles common unit behaviour shared by emergency vehicles.
UnitStatus
 
UnitType
